name: operator override: aggregator load order is _universal → plugins (alphabetical) → _community → _operator (last)
setup:
for d in _universal google _community/foo _operator; do printf 'source:
  id: s-%s
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' "${d////-}" > "tree/${d}/x.yaml"; done
